name: com.billtruong.stylized-toon-world-kit
description: Hand-written HLSL stylized/toon shader kit for URP 17 / Unity 6. Modular core library (lighting, noise, surface, outline, URP compat) + per-shader ShaderGUI. Targets Mobile, PC and VR (Single-Pass Instanced). SRP Batcher & GPU Instancing friendly.
